debug_info.goal:
S : HarmonicOscillator
IC : ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions
t : Time
hx :
  ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC ≠ 0 ∨
    ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC ≠ 0
⊢ Time.deriv (ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC) t = 0 ↔
    ‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC t‖ =
      √(‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC‖ ^ 2 +
          (‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC‖ / S.ω) ^ 2)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
constructor
  · intro hv
    have he := trajectory_energy S IC
    simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy] at he

    have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
    rw [ω_sq] at ht
    field_simp at ht
    have : ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 = ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by linarith

    linarith [sq_nonneg ‖IC.x₀‖, sq_nonneg (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω)]
  · intro hp
    have he := trajectory_energy S IC
    simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at he
    have ht := he t
    rw [hp, Real.sq_sqrt] at ht
    have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
    rw [ω_sq] at ht
    field_simp at ht
    have : S.m * ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 = 0 := by linarith
    simp at this
    ext i
    fin_cases i
    simp [this]
    linarith [sq_nonneg ‖IC.x₀‖, sq_nonneg (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω)]
